body:
## PR 1 of 7 — Claude Company OS Foundation

First PR of the **Dealix Full Company Launch Blueprint v1**. Establishes the Claude Code operating layer **before** any website/product code is touched. Docs/config only — no website, source, pricing, copy, or growth files.

### What's in this PR
- **`CLAUDE.md`** — operating constitution: Dealix = Saudi AI Business Operating System (Revenue = one wedge), anti-positioning, the 5 questions, **Command Sprint = rebrand of the live 499 SAR sprint**, the canonical 6-rung ladder, the hard rules, the 14 OS modules, the plan→approve→PR→verify workflow, and the **real** verification commands (explicitly: there is no `npm test`).
- **`.claude/agents/*`** — 10 launch role agents (founder-ceo-operator, brand-director, visual-identity-designer, website-architect, growth-strategist, seo-geo-agent, conversion-specialist, proof-governance-reviewer, delivery-architect, qa-verifier). Additive to the existing 5 execution agents.
- **`.claude/skills/*`** — audit-positioning, write-bilingual-page, build-free-tool, assemble-proof-pack, run-launch-gates.
- **`.claude/commands/*`** — launch-status, verify-launch, new-page, new-growth-asset, governance-review.

### Notes for reviewers
- `.gitignore` ignores all of `.claude/`; new files were **force-added**, matching how the existing 5 agents are tracked. (Optional follow-up: add explicit negation rules.)
- This PR **cross-links** the existing authoritative governance (`docs/governance/`) and registers (`dealix/registers/*.yaml`) rather than duplicating them.
- It does **not** modify the live site, README, or pricing — those are PR 3.

### Verification
`git diff --stat` = 21 files, +575, all under `CLAUDE.md` + `.claude/`. No out-of-scope changes.

### Next
**PR 2 — Brand + Visual + Module-Status Truth** (`docs/00_platform_truth/*`), the truth layer the website PR depends on.

> Draft: held for founder review. Nothing merges/ships without approval — this draft PR is the approval checkpoint.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01D49kYUqy6ekg5to9esqSJH

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01D49kYUqy6ekg5to9esqSJH)_
